instruction: Help me enter the reimbursement into the expense ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Expense Reimbursement Form
Applicant: Xie Ting
Department: Marketing Dept
Application Date: 2025-03-14
Expense Type: Business Trip
Destination: Shenzhen
Trip Date: 2025-03-10 to 2025-03-12
Transportation: 1280 CNY
Accommodation: 960 CNY
Meals: 350 CNY
Total: 2590 CNY' > /home/user/Desktop/expense_claim.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Applicant'; ws['B1'] = 'Department'; ws['C1'] = 'Expense Type'; ws['D1'] = 'Destination'; ws['E1'] = 'Transport(CNY)'; ws['F1'] = 'Accommodation(CNY)'; ws['G1'] = 'Meals(CNY)'; ws['H1'] = 'Total(CNY)'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/expense_log.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the reimbursement into the expense ledger

Fill the reimbursement information from /home/user/Desktop/expense_claim.txt into /home/user/Desktop/expense_log.xlsx row 2: A2='Xie Ting', B2='Marketing Dept', C2='Business Trip', D2='Shenzhen', E2=1280, F2=960, G2=350, H2=2590, save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/expense_log.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'Xie Ting' in s else 'FAILED')"
